name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Swift Title Loans offers car title loans in Memphis with borrowing amounts from $100–$50,000, accepting applicants with bad credit and past bankruptcies.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans operates a physical location at 1473 S Trezevant St in Memphis, Tennessee, specializing in car title loans as a fast cash solution. The company advertises same-day funding for applicants who sign up by noon, positioning itself as an accessible option for consumers facing financial emergencies regardless of credit history.

The company offers secured loans using vehicle titles as collateral, with loan amounts ranging from $100 to $2,000 for standard products and up to $50,000 for larger secured loans. Their application process is conducted both online and in-person, with staff assistance available during business hours (Mon–Fri 9am–7pm, Sat 10am–5pm). The company claims to use 256-bit SSL and TLS security for online transactions and explicitly welcomes applicants with bad credit and past bankruptcies.

Swift Title Loans distinguishes itself through same-day cash disbursement and a stated policy of allowing borrowers to keep their vehicle while repaying the loan. Customer reviews consistently highlight a staff member named Alfred for patient explanations and straightforward application processes. The company maintains competitive positioning in the regional finance market and emphasizes transparent communication about loan terms.

However, the profile warrants scrutiny: customer reviews appear formulaic and contain unusual language patterns (references to "cloud-based personal loans" and "collateral personal loans" that don't match title loan products), raising questions about review authenticity. No APR, interest rate, or fee information is publicly disclosed on the website. As a title lender, this product carries inherent risks—default results in vehicle repossession. The lack of transparent pricing and the nature of title loans as high-risk products make this unsuitable for consumers with stable income or alternative borrowing options.
address: 6711 E Fowler Ave #12C, Temple Terrace, FL 33617

company_info.headquarters: 6711 E Fowler Ave #12C, Temple Terrace, FL 33617

pros: Same-day funding available for applications submitted by noon
Accepts applicants with bad credit histories and past bankruptcies
Loan amounts range from $100–$50,000, accommodating various cash needs
Online application option available; no requirement to visit physical location
Staff reported as patient and helpful in explaining loan terms (per reviews)
Uses 256-bit SSL and TLS encryption for online security
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee schedules disclosed on website—pricing transparency absent
Requires vehicle title as collateral; default results in vehicle repossession and loss of transportation
Customer reviews appear formulaic with suspicious repetition and keyword stuffing, undermining credibility
Limited payment plan options reported in customer feedback
Physical office has operational limitations (closed Sundays; parking lot crowding mentioned)
best_for: Vehicle owners facing genuine financial emergencies who need cash within hours
Consumers with damaged credit unable to qualify for traditional personal loans or credit cards
Borrowers with reliable income who can commit to rapid repayment to recover their vehicle title
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is appropriate for vehicle owners in genuine financial emergencies who have exhausted other borrowing options and can afford rapid repayment. The critical caveat is that title loans are high-cost, high-risk products where default results in permanent loss of your vehicle; combined with the website's lack of disclosed rates and suspiciously generic reviews, consumers should seek traditional personal loans, credit union PALs, or non-profit credit counseling before committing to a title loan.
services: Car title loans ($100–$2,000 standard; up to $50,000 for secured loans)
Loan approval for applicants with bad credit
Loan approval for applicants with past bankruptcies
Vehicle title holding with borrower vehicle retention
